entries.title: Missing Rate Limiting
entries.summary: Sensitive operations with no rate limits

indicators: No per-block or per-epoch limits on value-moving operations
No cooldown periods between critical actions
Unbounded operation frequency for minting/withdrawing/parameter changes
design_context.description: Sensitive operations such as minting, withdrawing, and parameter changes have no rate limits. An attacker or compromised admin can drain or disrupt in a single transaction or rapid sequence.

entries.title: Ordering Assumptions
entries.summary: Design assumes specific operation order without enforcing it

indicators: Price updates assumed to arrive before dependent operations
No commit-reveal scheme where ordering matters
design_context.description: The design assumes operations execute in a specific order but doesn't enforce it. MEV searchers, frontrunners, or concurrent users can reorder transactions to extract value.
